subject: FW: The Answer
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Thursday, December 13, 2007 1:52 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: The Answer

First, thanks for coming to the party. It was wonderful to see you there. 

In response to john's question:

1) Instruct wico to do everything possible to assist in the expeditious movement of foot and vehicular traffic to yacht haven from the cruise ship docks and havensite and vice versa. This would include permitting the immediate implementation of a trolley system, the removal of any restrictions on our ability to implement incentive programs for taxis, etc. 

2) Actively support a referendum to permit a casino to be built in the octagonal yacht club building that sits out in the middle of the harbor. 

These two things would do it. Also, I want to invite john and cecile to be our guests at the yhg new year's eve party. How shall I go about doing that?
--------------------------------------------------------

 
The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not necessarily represent those of the company.

-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com]
Sent: Thursday, December 13, 2007 1:52 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: The Answer

First, thanks for coming to the party. It was wonderful to see you there.

In response to john's question:

  1. Instruct wico to do everything possible to assist in the expeditious movement of foot and vehicular traffic to yacht haven from the cruise ship docks and havensite and vice versa. This would include permitting the immediate implementation of a trolley system, the removal of any restrictions on our ability to implement incentive programs for taxis, etc.

  2. Actively support a referendum to permit a casino to be built in the octagonal yacht club building that sits out in the middle of the harbor.

These two things would do it. Also, I want to invite john and cecile to be our guests at the yhg new year's eve party. How shall I go about doing that?
